# Daze Antony

> Daze Antony (Bindu Antony) — Legal Advisor, Entrepreneur and Founder & CEO of D&R Goldenwings International Trading Co. Corporate legal advisory, international trade and business consultancy across India, China and the Middle East.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Daze Antony's practice and ventures.
- [About](/about): Biography, career timeline, achievements and insights.
- [Expertise](/expertise): Eight practice areas — legal advisory, international trade, business consultancy, corporate strategy, education, tourism, fashion and lighting.
- [Gallery](/reels): Photos and video reels from talks, events and global engagements.
- [Consultation](/consultation): Book a paid consultation session via WhatsApp.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, WhatsApp and office details.
